system.descriptor: Command represents a character's ability to issue orders and have them obeyed, through force of personality, rank, or both.
system.uses:
Uses: Issuing orders to subordinates, rallying troops, coordinating group actions, inspiring others in battle.
Special Use: Inspire: As a Full Action, a character can make a Command test to remove one level of Fatigue from all allies within earshot who can understand them, for each Degree of Success.
Special Use: Terrify: With an opposed Command vs Willpower test, the character can force an enemy to flee or cower.

description.value: Command represents a character's ability to issue orders and have them obeyed, through force of personality, rank, or both.
